# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Related Issue

Link any related issue here.

Example:

Closes #123

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Community or project setup
- [ ] Other

## Three-Process Area

Which part of the Larjango workflow does this affect?

- [ ] Plan
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Review & Deploy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Community

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contributing guide
- [ ] My changes are clear and focused
- [ ] I have explained why this change is needed
- [ ] I have tested the change, if applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation, if needed

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots, examples, or extra notes if helpful.
